## Privacy And Security

- [ ] This change does not add storage, logs, telemetry, screenshots, prompts, completions, or raw typing text.
- [ ] If it changes Typing Context, Personal Memory, auth, billing, telemetry, redaction, or provider calls, I described the impact and guardrails.
- [ ] I removed secrets, tokens, prompts, generated text, raw typing logs, and private user data from the PR.
